items.name_en: M82132 Misty Blue! [Pocket Card Case Wallet] 'Porto Cult LV Charm' made of Monogram Unplant leather. Features 2 card slots on each side and 1 large slot in the middle, totaling 5 slots, making it a practical item for daily use. Decorated with 2 Monogram Flower pendants, adding a very feminine impression.

items.name_en: M82144 Pink
items.name_cn:
M82144 Pink
Crafted from grained Taurillon leather, this piece features a color contrast between the interior and exterior. The LV monogram slide fastener draws inspiration from the Capucines handbag's closure design. The exquisite structure conceals ample space, featuring a card slot and a zippered accordion pocket for coins.
9 x 12 x 1 cm
(Length x Height x Width)

Autumn/Winter New Short Wallet

items.name_en: M82926 Silver
items.name_cn:
M82926 Silver
Like the "Metis" leather goods series, this compact wallet is made of soft Monogram Unplant leather. The flap features a small silver S-lock style buckle inspired by Louis Vuitton's traditional trunks, a key detail. Despite its compact size, it offers practicality with a zippered coin pocket, 2 flat pockets, and 6 card slots.
11.5 x 8.5 x 4 cm

items.name_en: M83112 Canvas! (Makeup Bag) The Locker Dopp Kit combines modern style with Louis Vuitton's iconic elegance, crafted from the brand's classic Monogram Eclipse canvas. It features practical functions such as a washable lining and a comfortable, adjustable side handle. The compact design is surprisingly spacious enough to hold all essentials, perfectly blending style and utility. 23 x 13 x 12 cm (Length x Height x Width).

items.name_en: M83271 Silver Clasp
items.name_cn:
M83271 Silver Clasp
A 'Portefeuille Victorine' reinterpreted with soft Monogram Unplant leather. The iconic Monogram pattern is subtly embossed. The envelope-style flap opens and closes with a 'Louis Vuitton' signature clasp. The interior features a bill and coin pocket, as well as 6 card slots.
12 x 9.5 x 1.5 cm
